facebook.caption:
5.0 stars. 47 reviews. Zero compromises.

Lam Vegan - Tiệm Chay Lam inside Grand World Phú Quốc is holding a perfect rating, and the reviews back it up every single time. Plant-based done right in the middle of one of Phu Quoc's busiest districts. No filler dishes, no tourist shortcuts.

If you're vegan, vegetarian, or just eating cleaner on this trip, this is your spot.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
